meaning: there is a good chance that something will happen — probably will
chineseMeaning: 很可能会……；大概会……；有可能……
anchorSentence: This change is likely to break existing tests if we do not update the mocks.
collocations: be more likely to / less likely to
be likely to succeed / fail / improve
notes: likely to vs going to: going to is more certain. likely to vs probably: both ~70-80%, but likely to is more formal. Watch the subject: It is likely to rain vs He is likely to resign.
recallQuestions: 那只猫咪预报员说有七八成把握，对应哪个英文结构？
be likely to 和 be going to 在确定程度上有什么区别？
用 be likely to 写一句和你项目或工作有关的英文句子。
